decision_label: Capital Radar may upgrade from research-only to decision-support language.

upgrade_conditions.condition: News collector is wired and fresh (<6h)
XBRL fundamentals collected for ≥5 equity tickers
Strict gate: zero banned language markers

source_confidence_standard.research_only_posture: Default until: (1) news is live, (2) XBRL fundamentals collected, (3) strict language gate clear, (4) numeric price levels filled.
source_confidence_standard.decision_support_posture: Permitted when all upgrade conditions above are met simultaneously.
source_confidence_standard.capital_action_posture: Requires decision-support posture PLUS: defined risk budget per position, primary-source evidence for each candidate, explicit invalidation levels.

research_only: Forbidden: "buy now", "recommended action", "entry signal confirmed", "strong conviction add".
decision_support: Permitted: "evidence supports add-review near [zone]", "invalidation at [level]", "thesis gate cleared".
